rationale: The benchmark demonstrates LLM capability in generating exploitation scripts, which transfers moderately to the Execution phase through faster script generation and obfuscation iteration. However, the core challenge—evading EDR through living-off-the-land techniques—requires operational tradecraft and real-time adaptation that extends beyond the benchmark's scripting capabilities. Expected uplift is 8-13 percentage points above the 50% baseline, reflecting LLM value as an accelerator rather than a fundamental capability enabler.
